title: The Emerald Tablet
source: Arabic original (Kitab Sirr al-Khaliqa); Latin translation
description: The most famous alchemical text: 'As above, so below' — the entire Hermetic worldview in a single page.
introduction: The most famous alchemical text: 'As above, so below' — the entire Hermetic worldview in a single page.

translation.original_text: Quod est superius est sicut quod est inferius, et quod est inferius est sicut quod est superius.
translation.text: That which is above is like that which is below, and that which is below is like that which is above.
